note: V3-CST-02 running-cost dashboard defaults (GET /api/v1/costs). vps.monthly_yen is edited by a human at deploy time (same convention as consented-crons.json/economy-policy.csv — no live admin-write API; config/ is deploy-time正本, not a runtime KV). r2.pricing rates are configurable estimates — verify against the current Cloudflare R2 pricing page before treating exact yen figures as authoritative.
